response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience and holds a BS in Computer Science. He brings valuable entrepreneurial experience as a founder and has recently worked on AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused heavily on AI strategy, and Bogdan's AI experience appears quite recent. He lacks the deep, long-term track record in AI strategy and recognized industry expertise typically expected at this seniority level.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across various tech stacks and platforms.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of an open-source geo-data platform.
Demonstrated passion for knowledge sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: AI experience appears to be very recent and lacks the strategic depth expected for a Director-level role.
Highest corporate title achieved is Staff Engineer, which may indicate a gap in operating at a Principal level.
Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
